name: sitemap
description: Verify that sitemap.xml is accessible for each enabled locale and returns valid XML. Locales must be read dynamically from project.config.js (languages.enabled) — never hardcode them.

testCases.name: should return HTTP 200 and valid XML for each enabled locale sitemap
steps: Read enabled locales from project.config.js (languages.enabled) using fs + require/path — find the file by walking up from process.cwd() until project.config.js is found
For each locale, send GET request to /{locale}/sitemap.xml
assertions: response status is 200 for each locale sitemap
body contains valid XML sitemap markup
